# uptime_cloudstatus_groups (Data Source)

Look up Cloud Status provider groups - the vendors/providers that can be referenced by a cloudstatus check. Pair with `uptime_cloudstatus_services` to discover the services under each group.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `search` (String) Case-insensitive substring matched against the provider group name

### Read-Only

- `groups` (Attributes List) Matching Cloud Status provider groups (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--groups))
- `id` (String) Placeholder identifier for the data source

<a id="nestedatt--groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `groups`

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number) Unique identifier for the provider group
- `name` (String) Name of the provider group
